sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Vantunga i Pa in A hong itna
Hong piak Lai Siangtho sungah hong gen ta
Lai Siangtho sungah thu a ngaihpha pen
Zeisu in kei hong itna mah hipen.
Chorus
Zeisu'n hong it man ka nuampha hi
Kei hong it hi, kei hong it hi
Zeisu'n hong it man ka nuampha hi
Kei nangawn hong it hi.
Verse2
Amah mangngilhin ka taisan hangin
Hong it lailai hi, ka mangthang hangin
Zeisu in hong it ken ka phawk kik a
Ama angsung ka delh kik vingveng ta.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: A phatna teng tawh A mai ka muh teh
La khat bek sa thei ding hong kici leh
Bang la ka sazaw diam hi lo a dang
"Zeisu in kei hong it piandanglua sa ng.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Zeisu'n hong it a, kei zong ka it hi
Ka kha hehpihin tan ding hong kum hi
Hong it manin singlamteh tung si a
Tua ahih ciang hong it takpi hi ta.
